attacking_style: Opportunistic long-range attacks on penultimate climbs (30+ seconds gaps), exploiting hesitation among favorites rather than pure climbing power. Struggles when requiring finishing speed or sustained efforts.
team_tactics: Limited domestique support visible; often isolated and unable to contribute to collective efforts. Tends to operate as solo opportunist rather than benefiting from structured team setup.
terrain_preference: Medium-length climbs where tactical timing matters more than pure watts. Exposed on short punchy circuits and when sprint speed required to finish moves. Struggles on sustained high-intensity climbs.
vulnerability: Lacks pace on short, steep gradients even against weaker climbers. Cannot match sustained high tempo when on limit. Finishing speed inadequate to convert attacks into wins when caught.
key_patterns: Attacks when favorites mark each other, not from strength; two observed instances of tactical opportunism
Unable to sustain efforts when at threshold; admitted limitations and failed chases in two Giro appearances
Post-setback attacks appear desperate rather than calculated; lacks recovery form to execute properly
Isolated racing style with minimal team contribution visible across three separate race observations
form_trajectory: negative: 2021 showed inability to match pace of weaker climbers on minor categorized climbs, significant decline from 2019 Lombardia win
